hotel_name: Khách sạn Công Đoàn Việt Nam (Cong Doan Viet Nam Hotel)

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text: Bad service from the receptionist

reviews.title: Staff are not well trained
reviews.text:
The staff not welcoming us. During the check in. We know that they don't understand English. We use Google translate. Their face like annoying . 
They will like to have personal phone to call without serve customer. Even u waiting them in front the counter. The service really really bad.

reviews.title: Old building n spooky vibes
reviews.text:
This is an old Military hotel and as soon as u will enter the hotel,  and reach tonur floor, feeling of old haunting house will surround u. It is not in the city center so u hv to walk almost 1km to reach to the main spots of the city. 
I didn't like the hotel at all and despite having booked for 4 nights, I moved to a other hotel at the center where I can feel the city

reviews.title: Receptionist are bad
reviews.text: Firstly, air conditioner and bathtub are not working properly, so we request to check this to receptionist and her response was she didn’t understand and no one checked the room. Except the cleaning staff , she is friendly. But receptionist are not friendly and don’t understand English very well and responses are terrible. And also, no one carries our luggages and go up to our room ourselves and also the check out time. Finally, kitchen staffs are not friendly and we request to fried two eggs but she doesn’t look us and shake her hand like go away. Overall, services are horrible and Don’t recommend to stay.

reviews.title: Không hài lòng
reviews.text:
1. I asked for more pillow but hotel staff said “No, one bed one pillow”
2. I found one bath tower missing after room cleaning so I asked the hotel to fill in. A staff came with the tower but she asked to come inside to check if it is true before give us the tower.
3. Electricity was cut one morning for a couple of hours when we still in room: no light, no air conditioner. We have to use flash light from iphone to go to the WC to wash our face and do teethbrush and change clothes.
4. The smell: Hotel has old smell from the lobby to the room.
5. The yard in front of the hotel is used as parking place and alway full of cars. Car even parked on the small path to the lobby.

reviews.title: Tired with grumpy staff
reviews.text: This may have been a 3 star back in the day but would probably rate a 1 these days, foyer looks nice, breakfast is good, the rest is shabby, old, broken and tired, was very disappointed as was expecting way better for the money, also building work going on near by so work noise all night, would not go back, female staff at check in were not welcoming, all in all a mediocre stay and not worth the money

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text: So bad

reviews.title: Dirty room
reviews.text: I won't recommend this room. The bed sheets had stain, the carpet was sticky and room was smelly. I book for 2 nights but checked out in 1 night. Poor maintenance

reviews.title: ok but old rooms
reviews.text: big rooms but air-conditioning wasn't nearly cold enough

reviews.title: Old Trade Union hotel from communist times
reviews.text:
Compared to modern hotels - this was extremely old school. 

Dirty carpets in the hallways and room + cupboards that could not be opened because of the musty smell. Everything seemed like it belonged to a time 50 years ago!

The location was also around 2 kms from the Hoan Kiem lake happenings.

Breakfast was terrible! The staff was never there also!

On the plus side - the bathroom was big and bright + the beds were nice and firm.

Stay only if you are interested in walking back 2 kms to your hotel > having a good shower and then crashing out to sleep. 

Don't open the cupboards. Nobody has in the last 50 years and you should not too!

reviews.title: Good location for business
reviews.text: Good location

reviews.title: Mushy
reviews.text: It’s a military hotel, chose it because it s just blocks away from the exhibition centre. It’s an old hotel, Aircond had an creaky sound and took minutes to actually run.

reviews.title: Old building
reviews.text: Building is old and furniture too. Bedsheets had stain marks. They wdint change the bedsheets the next day.

reviews.title: Will not come back
reviews.text:
I'm a man of few words, so here are my short review:
1. Bads
- No one at front desk when I arrive.
- Room card was declined 3 times during my stay (1 night), I need to get the staff to open for me.
- Morning breakfast were poor less than 10 dishes including vegetables.
- Staff were not smiling while serving omlet and got order wrong.
- I left my shampoo bottle and called 1 day after, and the staff hung up on me.
- No good view
- Bed was not comfortable.

2. Good
- Friendly help me checking out when I was not in hotel.
- In center area, not too far to go out.

reviews.title: Bad hygiene,  bad furnishing, bad communication
reviews.text: Bad all, everything

reviews.title: Okays
reviews.text: Overall okays. Room rate a bit high. The room was very old school, spacious and bright. Buffet breakfast was good. The downside: old bedframe was noisy and sounded weird. The room design was very old fashioned.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: This is my first time to Hanoi, Vietnam. I can't compared to other hotels there but to hotels in my home country. The worse thing is there are 2 Vietnam Trade Union Hotel with the same name in Grab car services and lead me to another location. I suspected not right initially to inform the Grab driver but as usual he looks like everything yes when he can't communicate in English. Luckily, I alerted the driver halfway when already one hour in trip and called the hotel instead. Even tough I can't read Vietnamese but read from digit there is looks like still another 1 hour plus to go on the apps message. The hotel should sort out the name issue, otherwise much time wasted on the trip and missed appointment made.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Good location in the center of Hanoi city and the top choices of location near Hanoi International Exhibition Center (around 100m). The room is comfortable, big space but the facilities is old. Breakfast is not focused.  In general, the hotel is value for money.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: good location but old style room

reviews.title: You need to clean and maintain the common areas like the lobby and dining hall.
reviews.text: Dining area: the tablecloths are not clean, there is a smell, the first-floor lobby is not clean and beautiful, which is very unfortunate for a great location and a large hotel. The large lobby is not well arranged. Weeds are growing outside.

reviews.title: Suggestions
reviews.text: The electrical outlets in room 525 have no power. I reported it to the hotel reception but it hasn't been fixed.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room designated for smoking has a strong smell of cigarettes. The amenities are not new but clean. There should be a tissue box in the room and a trash can.

reviews.title: Car stop
reviews.text: This hotel collect parking fees from us (from.their customers)

reviews.title: A spacious room for the price.
reviews.text: The cheapest room is over 30 square meters, which is spacious and comfortable. The room is also clean. There are limited staff members who speak English. The bathroom is large and has a spacious bathtub. It is located within walking distance from Hanoi Station. There are local eateries and upscale Vietnamese restaurants in the vicinity, and across the street, there is a Brazilian restaurant, so dining options are plentiful. The issue is that there is no power outlet at the desk that also serves as a dresser. For business use, since you cannot use your computer while it is plugged in, you have to rely on the internal battery of your laptop, which can be a concern. Overall, I think it is a hotel with a high cost-performance ratio.

reviews.title: Gd location
reviews.text: Gd location & near to the exhibition centre. However, the room is very old style & the light has some problem

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: A refuge for the poor.
reviews.text: If you don't have enough travel expenses, come here. Although the facilities are old, they are not unbearable, and even if the breakfast is not diverse, it's enough to get by. If your purpose is not a hotel vacation, come here and stay. The surroundings are not very bustling, and if you go a little further down, there's a small lake, and if you go further, you'll reach the Unification Park. Enjoy your budget-friendly travel, everyone.

reviews.title: Center hotel
reviews.text: Hotel is quite old but clean. Position is convenient for traveling Old Quarters. There is parking place with fee.

reviews.title: Tôi đi họp
reviews.text: Mặc đầu Agoda có ghi chú là Ks sẽ xuất hóa đơn nhưng ks không xuất hóa đơn

reviews.title: Good Value for a 3 Star Hotel
reviews.text: The staff went out of their way to serve guests and provide extra help -  I am looking forward to my next visit.

reviews.title: All good but a little out of the way
reviews.text: This ain't the city centre but in the posh part of town nonetheless. You may walk to the centre in a few minutes bur far from and convenience stores.  Otherwise nice and clean stay. Yes, folks were good and the property is supe spacious. Seems like a government-owned space.

reviews.title: The hotel has parking for cars.
reviews.text: The hotel has a parking lot, I recommended it to three families of my friends, booked through Agoda, the booking clearly stated: "Parking, breakfast, free wifi" but in reality, my friends' family was charged 50,000 VND per room for parking.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Nice stay

reviews.title: Really love the location in the center of Hanoi.
reviews.text: The hotel is centrally located, making it suitable for both travel and business in Hanoi. The affordable price is suitable for families with an average income.

reviews.title: I don't have hot water ㅓ.
reviews.text:
The place, the kindness, it was good
The room smelt like it.
The important issue is that the hot water doesn't come out ㅓ.

reviews.title: good ,second checked in
reviews.text: good ,second checked in

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm Hà Nội
reviews.text: Khách sạn có bao ăn uống, các dịch vụ đều rất ổn, tuy nhiên hôm mình đi thì khách sạn đang sửa chữa lại cổng vào, hi vọng là sau khi sửa xong thì khách sạn sẽ có view đẹp hơn và sẽ có những trải nghiệm tốt hơn nữa ở lần tới

reviews.title: Super hotel

Big comfortable room.  Lovely staff, and great location. 
Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: The hotel is completely suitable and meets the requirements.
reviews.text: The room is clean, fully furnished, and the staff are friendly.

reviews.title: Old but gorgeous.
reviews.text: I chose this hotel because I wanted to visit the railway cafe. I think the cost performance is good considering the breakfast included and the size for this price. There was an ashtray on the table, but there was no smell in the room. I arrived in the early afternoon, and when I tried to leave my luggage, they let me check in right away because the room was available. Thank you very much.

reviews.title: The hotel is fine.
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the staff is friendly, the location is very good because it is close to the center, the parking lot is spacious, everything is reasonable.

reviews.title: Frontdesk staff
reviews.text: The hotel is old but good for budget conscious traveller, buffet breakfast is good, location is okey but frontdesk staff is hard to communicate.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Great location , big rooms and supportive staff. Hotel is quite old and rooms are dated, otherwise good.

reviews.title: It is nice to stay
reviews.text: I have stayed 4 nights for our business. It is at center area so you can visit famous place easy. Breakfirst is ok, but do not have much food service here. Thanks.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good overall

reviews.title: close to culture and friendship convention center
reviews.text: good

reviews.title: Services above and beyond
reviews.text: During my last stay, my itinerary changed, and I had to quickly make an early checkout and hustle off to the Noi Bai airport.  About halfway through my cab ride to the airport I realized that I had left my headphones in my hotel room..  in a panic. I called the front desk and ask them if there was any chance that they might be able to have someone bring the headphones to me at the airport or in the absence of that retrieve them and hold them for me until my return or possibly post them to me.   To my great surprise and relief they informed me that they would call a cab. They had found the headphones and they would dispatch the cab driver to meet me at the airport and deliver the headphones to me!  The only provision was that I needed to be willing to pay for the cab fair which was marginal and so of course I accept accepted. In the time it took me to go into the airport check in and get my boarding pass. I was notified by the cab driver that he was outside and was attending my retrieval of the headphones.. We found each other easily since the concierge at the front desk given me a full description of the driver, the cab license number in and every detail.  I got my headphones back in plenty of time to casually make my way through the security checkpoints and make my flight.  The staff at Cong Doan are superlative! ❤️

reviews.title: Good for money
reviews.text: The breakfast was Ok.. but far from the central

reviews.title: Very affordable hotel in the city center
reviews.text:
Conveniently located hotel offering a very good sleep. If you are planning to spend most of your day outside the hotel - it's a great value for money. But as the name suggests - Viet Nam Trade Unions Hotel - it's a very practical and minimalist hotel.
One very positive aspect was the Brazilian Churrascaria Restaurant right opposite the Hotel. The staff was very helpful.
On the negative side - there were not enough power outlets to charge even three units... whatever was available was very inconveniently located.

reviews.title: Super Value, Centrally located, Super Staff
reviews.text: Another one of the Best kept value lodgings secrets  in Hanoi.  Not geared to pamper to the Park Avenue G5 jet setters, but more than adequate for the the other 99% of budget minded travellers who need a clean, safe, place to stay, with an amenable staff, and free awesome Pho and buffet breakfast included with your stay.

reviews.title: Decent hotel for business trip
reviews.text: Nice location but old facility. Good for short period business trip.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The first reason I chose this hotel was the room, it was spacious and bright. I saw many foreign guests also rented here. The staff was very supportive and willing to help us whenever we need. Next time I will come here with my family

reviews.title: It was a great deal with breakfast included.
reviews.text: I chose an affordable hotel close to the station. It was an old building, but it was quiet and clean. When I went to drop off my luggage first, I was helped by being allowed to check in early. The breakfast bun was also lightly flavored and delicious.

reviews.title: First class
reviews.text: I have stayed several times at Cong Doan and will stay there again. Excellent spacious rooms and very good breakfast. The staff are charming and most helpful.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Vị trí tại trung tâm, thuận tiện di chuyển. Bày trí, nhân viên phục vụ tốt. Tuy nhiên, phòng có hơi cũ dù vẫn được bảo trì tốt

reviews.title: ok
reviews.text: ok

reviews.title: Vietnamese Trade Union Hanoi
reviews.text: The room is clean, the location is convenient, the staff is hospitable and enthusiastic ... Reasonable prices.

reviews.title: In the center - so convenient
reviews.text: I have 10 days stay here. I'm really satisfied. The hotel is quite large and clean, the room is okay and the staff is really helpful. I really like it, and with a price is quite reasonable for a hotel in the centre, I think I was in luck when booking ^^

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good place

reviews.title: The room is very nice.
reviews.text: I have a dust allergy, so I requested a room without carpet. The staff are lovely, and it's close to the community area, making it easy to find food. There are delicious coffee shops around the hotel, and the transportation is convenient. Traveling alone feels very safe here.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: Location close to the center, spacious and clean rooms, friendly staff, quick check-in. Breakfast offers many options.

reviews.title: Superb room
reviews.text: It was a nice stay

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
This was the second time I've stayed there.  It does not disappoint and I will definitely stay there again. 
Spacious accommodation. Excellent breakfast.  Charming and helpful staff.

reviews.title: A hotel with good value for money.
reviews.text: Although the establishment is old, the rooms are spacious and the staff's attitude is very friendly. The breakfast is decent and the location is good as you can walk to Hoan Kiem. Among the hotels near Hoan Kiem, it offers great value for money.

reviews.title: Quiet and good hotel.
reviews.text: The hotel where I stayed briefly after arriving in Hanoi and before going to Ha Long Bay is in a quiet location, which is nice. There is a circus nearby that is worth seeing, as well as a large park.

reviews.title: General assessment
reviews.text: The room is clean, the staff is enthusiastic and professional, and the price is reasonable.

reviews.title: It is a satisfactory accommodation.
reviews.text: The price for the accommodation is good, spacious, and the bathroom is also large. It's not modern, but it's a luxurious hotel that shows signs of age. The staff is very friendly too.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Nice place and nice price

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is quiet, clean, and spacious. The staff is friendly and professional. I will come back next time.

reviews.title: The room is spacious.
reviews.text: The room is spacious. It is far from the famous restaurant close to the station. It has a very good location for round trips to the international exhibition center. The interior is very well maintained.

reviews.title: Traveling to Hanoi during National Day
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located, close to everything. It has a spacious parking area. The staff is enthusiastic. The breakfast buffet has quite a variety of dishes considering the room price. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: First Hanoi
reviews.text: Although it was away from the old town, I could get to Hoan Kiem Lake and the old town for about 100 yen by motorbike taxi, and the area was quiet with cafes around. The room was spacious and comfortable. The breakfast was also delicious. I want to come to Hanoi again.

reviews.title: Value-for-money hotel
reviews.text: The building is old, but it is well organized and clean, and the location is not bad. The staff is also friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and equipped with all necessary amenities. I checked in and out comfortably. The surrounding area has plenty of shops and restaurants. It's easy to get around, and I had no trouble finding the room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Nice room, there are many room types and views to choose from.
Friendly employee.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Staffs are nice. Offered me to check in early without additional fees. Location is good. The room is ok. Good for value wise

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The managers and staff are very friendly and enthusiastic. The room rate includes breakfast, which is delicious, and there is a wide variety of desserts.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very new hotel so it was good value for the money. The location was also very convenient.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean, comfortable bed and the toilet big than I imagined. This hotel looks quite new. This location suits for the people who have a motor bike, this hotel very near to the centre if you travel by walking.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Staff great attitude. Clean, nutritious breakfast. Around many restaurants, the room is relatively clean

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional

The staff is nice.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Easy check in/out. Convenient location. It's quiet at night, and comfortable beds, I slept really well. Staff is very friendly. A good budget friendly option for families.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: My girlfriend and I love the luxurious atmosphere of this place. The room were big, all amenities were fully provided. Location was very convient too. It was a wondeful experience.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The place was located conviently for accessing some famous attractions nearby. The staff were very friendly too, excellent room service. We had a very welcoming stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It was a great experience. Nice hotel, kind staff and warm stay. My husband and I enjoyed a lot our time there. I loved my holidays in Hanoi. I hope go back.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room was lovely clean and comfortable. The facilities are beautiful. Wonderful service and staff. Very friendly and professional. Amazing experience

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The rooms and facilities are classy, elegant and clean. Everyone in the hotel gave highly attentive, warm, respectful and delightful service.  I love this hotel!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The facilities looked fancy to me. The space was bright and elegant. My room was large rooms and had full amenities. I will come back here again on the next bussines trip.

reviews.title: This place was great!
reviews.text: This place was great!! The customer service when I first arrived was amazing. Tidy room and clean bathroom. Wifi and air conditioner work well. I will definitely be staying here again. Thanks for a great experience!

reviews.title: Correct niveau qualité - prix
reviews.text:
L’hôtel est bien placé au centre ville, propre et bien nettoyé tous les jours
Les équipements sont vieux, la baignoire est trop difficile à entrer/sortir, surtout pour les personnes âgées

reviews.title: Superbe emplacement au calme

reviews.title: Basico

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: 受付のスタッフが無愛想
reviews.text:
午前の金髪の男と1人の女は非常に悪いです。女はじっと携帯を見ながら接客し、態度が悪すぎて、めっちゃムカつきます。金髪の男は話し方も態度も最低です。
施設が古く、朝ごはんもあまりにも不味いです。
2度来ません。

reviews.title: お湯でない
reviews.text:
バスタブ付きの部屋でしたが、
お湯を張るほどの湯量でない。
タブの栓も無い。
蚊がいるので対応お願いしたが
返事だけで、蚊に悩まされた。
ちなみにボックスティッシュも
ありません。
周辺には気の効いたレストランありませ
ん。

reviews.title: 古い、伝達がされてない
reviews.text:
良くも悪くも、いろんな意味で古いホテルです。
チェックイン時にはAgodaから予約されてないと。フロントは二転三転し、その間、長い間待たされる羽目に。結局はチェックインできたもの、このやり取りが無駄。こっちは疲れてるので早く休みたかった。
リピートはまずないでしょう。

reviews.title: 乗り継ぎで宿泊しました。
reviews.text: 数日滞在するには、宿泊しないレベルです。トランジットで利用させて貰いました。リノベーションされていない分、安いホテルだと思います。部屋は、カビ臭かったので、女性は嫌いじゃ無いかな。トランジットで1泊だと耐えれます。朝食は、良かったと思います。ハノイ駅を利用する方は、徒歩で10分位で良いと思います。空港からは、86番のバスがハノイ駅まで来ますので、お時間がある方で1泊位だと良いと思います。

reviews.title: よい
reviews.text: 近くにローカルの良いお店がたくさんある

reviews.title: リーズナブル
reviews.text: コストパフォーマンスが非常に良いホテルです。寝るだけで・・・と言う方には、非常におすすめです。

reviews.title: スタッフの対応がよかった。
reviews.text:
食事は美味しく、スタッフの対応もおおむねよかった。
設備面のメンテナンスにもっと気を遣って欲しい。コンセント・浴室のドアノブ・電球・トイレットペーパーの補充など（一晩一部屋でこれだけあったわけではありません。他の人たちと一緒にagodaを通さずに泊まったひがあるので）。
reviews.positives: 比較的便利で手頃なホテルでした。

reviews.title: 職員の対応がしっかりしている
reviews.text: 職員の対応が礼儀正しくしっかりとしている。必要なものを頼むとフロアーに常駐する服務員が適切に助言、対応してくれた。
reviews.positives: フロアーに服務員が複数常駐し、困ったときなどに対応してくれた。

reviews.title: 期待以上でした
reviews.text:
設備の古さやサービス不足？と思われる部分もありましたが、基本的には思っていたより良かった。
近くに飲み物やスナックが買えるお店があれば、もう少し便利かとはおもう。
reviews.positives: 料金、ロケーション、広々した部屋

reviews.title: Exceptional

old but comfortable hotel.
I really enjoyed my stay here.

reviews.title: 安くて良い

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 装飾はロマンチックで、私の妻が部屋に入ると本当に興奮します。 ベッドは柔らかく快適でした。 スタッフもとても楽しかったです。 こんな素敵な場所！

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: この場所からの眺めは本当に素晴らしいものでした。 部屋は素敵なデザインで、とてもロマンチックでした。 スタッフとルームサービスは親切で、リクエストに対応してくれました。 私たちは滞在に本当に満足しました。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: スペースは明るく静かです。 リラックスするのに最適な場所。 広い部屋と充実した設備。将来機会があればここに戻ってきます。

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: โรงแรมที่ดีและให้บริการด้วยรอยยิ้ม
reviews.text:
เป็นโรงแรมที่น่าพักทีเดียว  พนักงานบริการดี 
ห้องพักสะอาด ขนาดเล็กไปหน่อย และมีชั้นสำหรับผู้ไม่สูบบุหรี่  
โดยเฉพาะบริเวณล๊อบบี้ก็ไม่พบคนสูบบุหรี่ การเดินทางจากสนามบินมาที่โรงแรมไม่ไกลมาก
อาหารเช้ารสชาติดี และมีเมนูหลากหลายพอสมควร
reviews.positives: ทำเลสะดวกใกล้งานแสดงสินค้า

reviews.title: ทำเลสะดวก
reviews.text: เพิ่มสลัดผักสำหรับอาหารเช้า

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 工作人員真的很有幫助和專業。 他們幽默地對待所有事情。 輝煌的地方，地理位置優越，美味的早餐！

reviews.title: 다신안갈래요
reviews.text: 위치도 별로고 위생도 별로고 조식은 더별로고 돈더주고 좋은데가세요 70-80년대 호텔 느낌이예요

reviews.title: 광고와 다른 것이 일상인 그곳
reviews.text: 콩도안 호텔은 베트남 공산 당이 운영하는 곳입니다. 그래서 시설이 20년 전 수준입니다. 대체로 당이 운영하는 호텔은 비슷한 수준입니다.

reviews.title: 박람회장근처숙소
reviews.text:
지저분합니다. 청소하는직원조차 불친절해요 
체크인할때 여권을맡겨야 합니다. 여권은체크아웃할때돌려줌. 조식은정말기대하지마세요  식탁보마저 지저분해요 너무별로예요

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
가성비 최고입니다
직원들도 친절하고 조식도 무난하고 저렴하게 숙박하기에는 괜찮습니다

reviews.title: 가격대비 만족
reviews.text:
비즈니스(출장)으로 이용했고, 
하노이 국제전시센터(ICE)에서 도보 3분 가량 거리로 이동시간이 아주 만족스러움.
다만 시설이 노후되어 있어 청결도는 좀 떨어지지만
가격대비 만족스러움

reviews.title: 전시장 이용시 최적임
reviews.text:
전시장과 시내관광지가 인접해 있어
가격대비 매우 만족함

reviews.title: 가격대비 괜찮네요
reviews.text:
가격:매우좋음

숙박기간:7일
식사:좋음(가격대비)
위치:전시장 가까운곳
방음:좋지않음 특히, 내가 입실한방이 공사장소음 새벽2-3시 시도때도없이 공사를 하는데 외부방음 좋지않아서 힘들었음 방바꾸기 귀찮아서 안바꿈

reviews.title: 가격대비 휼륭함
reviews.text: 전시장과 가깝고 비지니스에 적합한 호텔로 오래되었으나 깨끗하고 좋다.  식사도 잘 나온다.  12월에는 약간 춥다고 느껴져서 이불이 좀 더 두터웠으면 했다

reviews.title: 깨끗해요
reviews.text:
깨끗해요. 넓어요. 조용해요. 
전날 숙박했던 곳과 비교해서 가성비가 정말 좋았어요.
우선 품위가 있은 호텔이었어요.
조용하고 널찍한 객실과 홀, 그리고 바닥은 모두 양탄자가 깔려 있어요.
적극 추천합니다.

reviews.title: 출장이용때 좋았습니다
reviews.text: 출장이용때 좋았습니다.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 방은 넓고 호화로웠다! 장소의 모든 서비스도 훌륭했습니다. 가족 여행에 이상적인 선택이었습니다.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 장소는 매우 좋고 직원들은 매우 도움이되고 친절합니다. 방은 넓고 욕실은 깨끗하고 온수 샤워가 깨끗합니다. 우리가 여기있는 동안 소음에 관한 문제는 없었습니다. 우리는 다시 머물 것이다!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 호텔은 Ha Noi의 중심에 위치하고 있으며 큰 장점입니다. 직원들은 매우 정중하고 손님을 기쁘게 열망했습니다. 아침 식사는 매우 기뻤습니다. 일반적으로 멋진 여행을위한 고급 호텔입니다!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: 距离展会近 其他都一般。

reviews.title: 很不错的酒店
reviews.text: 依稀记得差不多二十年前跟旅游团到越南旅游时，在河内住的就是这家酒店，离河内火车站很近，所以这次来河内又订了这家酒店，这家酒店周围环境相对比较安静，离三十六行街有一段距离，但也不太远，走着过去就行，客人以越南本地人为主，早餐很一般。

reviews.title: WIFI不稳定
reviews.text: 早餐棒，地理位置好，环境还OK， WIFI不稳定。不满意的就是没有发票。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Very good

reviews.title: ممتاز
reviews.text: ممتاز لكن يعيبه الفطور ليس به اصناف كثيره

reviews.title: מלון נחמד, מעט מרוחק המעיר
reviews.text:
המלון ממקום מעט רחוק ממרכז העיר
היה קשה לתקשר עם העובדים כיוון שהם לא יודעים אנגלית
בקומה שבה ישנו היה ריח חזק ולא נעים של סיגריות, בנוסף הקירות מאוד דקים אז היה המון רעש מחדרים אחרים בקומה

reviews.title: Lễ tân Vũ Hoàng Thảo quá tệ
reviews.text: Đặt phòng qua Agoda bị lễ tân: Vũ Hoàng Thảo đối xử và xử lý thái độ rất là tệ, Agoda xem lại việc hợp tác

reviews.title: Không thích ks này
reviews.text: Tôi book trên Agoda phòng deluxe giường đôi giá 1,2tr nhưng khi đến ks lại bố trí phòng 2 giường đơn, báo hết phòng giường đôi. Phòng tôi ở k đủ tiêu chuẩn của phòng deluxe

Có bãi đổ xe có vẻ rộng rãi hơn mấy ks khác (có tính phí)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: cần cải tiến mùi hồi trong KS

reviews.title: Không đáng tiền
reviews.text:
ĐỒ PHòng tắm hư hỏng 50%. Ko sạch
Giường ọp ẹp
Thu phí gửi xe qua đêm
2 ng lớn. 2 trẻ em. 
Phụ thu 300k 1 trẻ lớn
Không phù hợ với giá tiền.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Nhân viên không chủ động chào hỏi và tạm biệt khách, mình ở 2 ngày 1 đêm, lúc check out thu phí xe ô tô để qua đêm 50k mà không được báo trước khoản phụ thu này.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Sieu chan. Chat luong phong xau. Nha ve sinh khong dep de sach se
Nghi 1 lan khong muon quay lai lan 2

reviews.title: Khách sạn quá xuống cấp
reviews.text:
Nội thất cũ kĩ. Trên tường còn bị trẻ con vẽ bậy mà không tẩy xoá. 
Các mép trên bồn rửa mặt đầy vết ẩm mốc, cặn bám lâu ngày.  
Ăn sáng buffet nhưng ko đa dạng.
Sữa chua bị hỏng. (Có thể do hôm trước khách chưa dùng hết, bên ks đem vào hôm sau lại đem ra cho khách đung tiếp)

reviews.title: Bị hủy phòng không báo trước
reviews.text:
Khi Tôi đến để nhận phòng thì  nhân viên k/s báo hết phòng.
Tôi đưa bằng chứng đặt phòng qua Agoda đã được xác nhận thành công. Tôi rất buồn không được sự hợp tác từ nhân viên k/s.  
Họ đã tự hủy phòng và không Thông báo trước bằng tin SMS hay gọi điện thoại .

reviews.title: Phù hợp gia đình có trẻ nhỏ
reviews.text: Có bãi xe phí 50k, khách sạn rộng rãi, nội thất cũ.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Nhân viên thấy đặt phòng qua Agoda thì thay đổi thái độ, tỏ ra khó chịu và ép khách phải chấp nhận 1 số điều kiện. Phòng ẩm, không gian cũ bẩn ko hợp với tiêu chuẩn 3 sao.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Không đáng với mức tiền bỏ ra. Đã thế để xe xong qua đêm bve thu 50k gửi xe. Lần đầu tiên thấy ksan thu tiền để xe.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Khách sạn cũ. 
Buffet sáng không đa dạng.
Bồn tắm không có khoá chặn nước.
Tivi chỉ mang tính chất trưng bày chứ không xem được. Hình ảnh tất cả các kênh đều bị nhoè như thời còn xài ăngten.
Cách âm kém.

reviews.title: ks đã xuống cấp
reviews.text:
tôi quay lại ks sau 15 năm, nội thất trong phòng quá cũ, bồn tắm bị tắc, chăn ga không được sạch sẽ, tôi không chắc họ thay chúng thường xuyên. 
nhân viên cũng không nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Tôi không happy lắm
reviews.text:
Tôi không thực sự hài lòng, mặc dù vị trí khách sạn khá thuận tiện.
- Phòng tuy rộng nhưng cũ và không mang lại cảm giác ấm cúng.
- Lễ tân ở mức chấp nhận được, nhưng không thực sự nhiệt tình, thậm chí còn tỏ ra không thích khách book qua Agoda.
- Bữa sáng nghèo nàn.

Khăn  tắm cũ, không có giấy lau trong phòng,.Chất lượng bữa sáng kém .

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Phòng ở bị mùi hôi từ lỗ cống thoát mước trong nhà vệ sinh bốc lên toả ra cả phòng!
Máy lạnh cũ kỹ và ồn khi hoạt động!
Không có khăn mặt, chỉ có khăn tắm và khăn lau tay!

reviews.title: Khách sạn k xứng với giá tiền
reviews.text: Khách sạn cũ, phòng cũ, phòng deluxe 1 giường là loại giường ngang 1,4m nằm 2 người k thoải mái, ăn sáng thì lèo tèo vài món, tỉnh xa đi xe oto cá nhân đến nghỉ, thì bị thu phí đỗ xe 50k/ngày
reviews.response: cám ơn a chị đã lựa chọn khách sạn công đoàn Việt Nam là điểm đến nghỉ chân.chúng tôi sẽ ngqyf càng hoàn thiện dịch vụ hơn . cám ơn a chị đã đóng góp. hiện dịch vụ gửi xe oto được tính theo note và thời gian . khách nghỉ khách sạn được hỗ trợ gửi từ 12h trưa đến 12h ngày hôm sau với giá chỉ 50k

reviews.title: Khách sạn lớn ở khu vực nhiều cơ quan NN
reviews.text: Khách sạn lớn, phòng rộng, riêng tư.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng đầy đủ đồ dùng, sạch, decor đơn giản. Nhân viên hỗ trợ nhanh.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Đầy đủ công năng, gọn gàng. Bảo vệ nhiệt tình, dễ thương. Tuyệt vời!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, nhân viên chu đáo, ngay khu trung tâm đông đúc. Bảo vệ rất dễ thương, gần gũi, lúc nào cũng cười chào khách.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Địa điểm gần trung tâm ngay đường chính. Bước chân ra là có quán ăn sáng và cf. Rất thuận lợi cho việc di chuyển.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Vị trí ngay trung tâm, rất tiện lợi để di chuyển
Phòng có mùi thơm dễ chịu

reviews.title: Lần sau sẽ lại đến ^^
reviews.text: Sạch sẽ , ở ngay trung tâm , giá rẻ ,các anh chị lễ tân chu đáo , Bạn lễ tân rất nhiệt tình. Hỗ trợ nhóm mình rất nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Ks đã chủ động đổi phòng khi tôi check in trước thời gian quy định mà lại là phòng 3 người khi tôi chọn phòng 2, nhờ vậy phòng rộng và thoải mái hơn.

reviews.title: Sạch, đẹp, thân thiện
reviews.text: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, thân thiện. Phòng sạch sẽ, rộng rãi, đầy đủ tiện nghi

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Chỉ đi bộ vài bước là đến. Giường rộng, êm, khá yên tĩnh. Phòng mới, nội thất đẹp. Được nâng cấp hạng phòng miễn phí. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, dễ thương.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời khi lưu trú tại đây.
reviews.text: Trung tâm, view đẹp. Em lễ tân và chú bảo vệ rất nhiệt tình,nếu có dịp sẽ qua nghỉ

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.text: Vị trí ngay ở trung tâm. Nhân viên khá nhiệt tình và hỗ trợ rất tốt. Phù hợp với giá tiền.Giường rất êm, yên tĩnh, sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: khách sạn ngay trung tâm, mình mang ôto đậu free. Vị trí ks ngay trung tâm HN, gần hồ hoàn kiếm, rất tiện đi lại.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Phòng rộng - view đẹp - thoáng mát - sạch sẽ - các anh nv khách sạn thân thiện

reviews.title: Rất hài lòng
reviews.text: Phòng tuyệt vời, vị trí đẹp, lễ tân vui vẻ nhiệt tình. Sẽ quay lại và giới thiệu cho người quen

reviews.title: Mọi thứ ở đây rất tốt
reviews.text: Tôi thích không gian ở đây, sạch sẽ và thoải mái. Đặc biệt nhân viên và bác bảo vệ rất nhiệt tình và vui vẻ.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời😊
reviews.text: vị trí đẹp, tiện nghi tốt, nhân viên lịch sự thân thiện ân cần.

reviews.title: Không gian và tiện nghi trong phòng!
reviews.text: Phòng ngủ rộng, thoáng mát, nội thất mới.Phục vụ nhiệt tình, dễ thương. Bảo vệ thân thiện!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: tiện nghi tốt so với giá tiền gần các địa điểm gần trung tâm. Rất gần hồ gươm.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Nhân viên lịch sự, nhiệt tình
Phòng sạch sẽ, được dọn dẹp mỗi ngày
Tiện nghi, cơ sở vật chất đẹp, hiện đại

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: chỗ ở trung tâm . sạch sẽ . nhân viên thân thiện nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nhân viên rất thân thiện, tiếp đón nhiệt tình, có chú hỗ trợ xách hành lý lên tận phòng! Phòng đẹp, mới, tiện nghi, giống y hình!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Phòng sạch, ánh sáng đầy đủ.
Có bàn làm việc.
Nhiều quán ăn xung quanh.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng rất sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, nhân viên phục vụ rất nhiệt tình 24/24 đều hỗ trợ chu đáo!

reviews.title: Отличная гостиница
reviews.text: Хороший завтрак(шведский стол), в номерах чисто и есть все необходимое, убирают, меняют постель и остальные принадлежности каждый день. Не дорогая по сравнению с остальными такого уровня.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good service and nice, friendly workers.  The room is a little old but it's clean and it's at a convenient location near center of downtown.

reviews.title: Cong Doan Vietnam Hotel
reviews.text: Not advisable and recommendable; our room stinks with cigar and we were so sensitive to cigar stink; staff are not that friendly also

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Pretty rundown.

reviews.title: Hanoi vocation.
reviews.text: Staff very helpful.
